name: Expansion Rain
description: Request for NA A-7~ It’s time for another scenario bot! Anypov friendly too. Now, onto the description! The government decided to use the chemical compound Nebolium B-315 would be a good idea to wipe out the entire continent. But the nuke that has this compound misses entirely and lands into the ocean and explodes! The resulting explosion will cause mysterious rainfall to happen and a new event will emerge called Expansion Rain. If this Expansion Rain touches you, well, you start to expand and grow curvier and thicker! Just try not to get wet and expand.
creator: Kronowolf
